papers.title: PowerLens: Taming LLM Agents for Safe and Personalized Mobile Power Management
papers.innovation: PowerLens introduces LLM agents for personalized, context-aware mobile power management, moving beyond static rules and heuristics to adapt to user activities and preferences.
papers.benchmarks: Improved battery life, enhanced adaptability to user activities and preferences, and better safety guarantees in mobile power management scenarios.
papers.use_case: Enhancing mobile operating systems for intelligent battery optimization, personalized user experience management on smart devices, and adaptive resource allocation in mobile environments.

papers.title: HyEvo: Self-Evolving Hybrid Agentic Workflows for Efficient Reasoning
papers.innovation: HyEvo introduces self-evolving hybrid agentic workflows that integrate LLMs with other specialized operators. This approach aims to significantly improve efficiency and performance over traditional LLM-only workflows for complex tasks.
papers.benchmarks: Improved efficiency and reasoning performance on complex tasks, likely demonstrated through comparisons against state-of-the-art LLM-only agentic workflows.
papers.use_case: Developing more robust, efficient, and scalable LLM agents for complex tasks in various domains, reducing computational costs, and improving task success rates for AI agent deployments.

papers.title: A Subgoal-driven Framework for Improving Long-Horizon LLM Agents
papers.innovation: This paper presents a novel subgoal-driven framework designed to significantly enhance the capabilities of LLM-based agents, particularly in handling challenging long-horizon tasks within dynamic digital environments.
papers.benchmarks: Demonstrates improved performance and reliability of LLM agents in complex long-horizon tasks such as web navigation, mobile interface control, and other intricate interactions in digital environments.
papers.use_case: Building more capable and reliable autonomous LLM agents for web automation, digital assistant applications, and complex interactive tasks across various digital platforms requiring extended planning and execution.
